title: Hearts Divided
writer: Laird Doyle, Casey Robinson, Rida Johnson Young
actors: Marion Davies, Dick Powell, Charles Ruggles
plot: Napoleon needs money to fight his wars in Europe so he wants 20 million dollars for the Louisiana Territory in the United States. To help the negotiations, he sends his brother, Jerome, to the U.S. on a goodwill tour. At a Marylan...
